🌐 Generate Website
GitHub Token (to commit to business-webpages)
🚀 Commits to vashish39/business-webpages under {city}/{slug}/index.html
⬇ Or click Download to save the HTML file locally
⚡ Enrich in Browser
Fetches full Google Places data for each selected business directly in the browser.
✓ API key loaded from dashboard-config.js — ready to go
📸 Photos → resolved to direct CDN URLs (no API key needed in the URL)
📞 Phone, hours, reviews, amenities → fetched from Google Places API
✉️ Emails & social links → run enrich.ts --scrape-website for these
